name: @hypaware/context-graph
description: T0 deterministic projection: materializes a node/edge activity graph from source-contributed contracts. Reads structured capture, emits graph rows with inline provenance — no models, exact-key matching only.

commands.name: graph project
commands.summary: Project every registered source contract into the node/edge activity graph

commands.name: graph compact
commands.summary: Merge duplicate graph rows and rewrite affected partitions sorted

commands.name: graph neighbors
commands.summary: Walk the activity graph from a node out to N hops
